name: CAPE Sandbox
description: CAPE (Configuration And Payload Extraction) is an open-source malware sandbox derived from Cuckoo, specializing in automated malware configuration and payload extraction with behavioral analysis

actions.name: Submit File
actions.description: Submit a file for CAPE sandbox analysis with optional configuration for package, timeout, and VM selection

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: File to submit for analysis (multipart form data)

parameters.name: package
parameters.description: Analysis package to use (e.g., exe, dll, pdf, doc, zip, jar, python)

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Analysis timeout in seconds (default: 200)

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Priority of the analysis task (1=low, 2=medium, 3=high)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Comma-separated analysis options (e.g., procmemdump=yes,free=yes)

parameters.name: machine
parameters.description: Specific analysis machine/VM name to use

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Target platform (e.g., windows, linux)

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tags for machine selection

parameters.name: custom
parameters.description: Custom data string passed to the analysis package

parameters.name: memory
parameters.description: Enable full memory dump of the analysis machine

parameters.name: enforce_timeout
parameters.description: Force the full analysis timeout even if the target process terminates early

parameters.name: clock
parameters.description: Virtual clock to set during analysis (format: %m-%d-%Y %H:%M:%S)

actions.name: Submit URL
actions.description: Submit a URL for analysis in the CAPE sandbox

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to analyze

parameters.name: package
parameters.description: Analysis package to use (e.g., ie, edge, chrome, firefox)

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Analysis timeout in seconds

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Priority of the analysis task (1-3)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Comma-separated analysis options

parameters.name: machine
parameters.description: Specific VM name to use

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Target platform (windows, linux)

parameters.name: memory
parameters.description: Enable full memory dump

actions.name: Get Task Status
actions.description: Check the current status of a submitted analysis task

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task ID returned from submission

actions.name: Get Report
actions.description: Retrieve the full analysis report for a completed task in JSON format including behavioral analysis, CAPE extractions, and network activity

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task ID to get the report for

actions.name: List Tasks
actions.description: List analysis tasks with optional pagination

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of tasks to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for pagination

actions.name: Delete Task
actions.description: Delete a task and its associated results from the CAPE database

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task ID to delete

actions.name: Get Screenshots
actions.description: Retrieve screenshots captured during sandbox analysis

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task ID to get screenshots for

parameters.name: screenshot
parameters.description: Specific screenshot number to retrieve (optional, returns all if omitted)

actions.name: Search by Hash
actions.description: Search for files in the CAPE database by MD5, SHA256, or internal ID

parameters.name: hash_type
parameters.description: Type of identifier: md5, sha256, or id

parameters.name: hash_value
parameters.description: The hash value or file ID to search for

actions.name: Get PCAP
actions.description: Download the network packet capture from an analysis

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Task ID to download PCAP for

actions.name: List Machines
actions.description: List all available analysis VMs/machines in the CAPE environment

actions.name: Get Server Status
actions.description: Return the current server status including version, task counts, and machine availability
